data/raw/{system}/metric_snapshots/realt.description: 5-minute interval realtime metric snapshots (IQ-1, IQ-2, SS-1, SS-2, SS-3)

data/raw/{system}/metric_snapshots/daily.description: Daily aggregated metrics (FC-1, SF-1, SF-2, SF-3, SS-4, TI-1, TI-4)

data/raw/{system}/metric_snapshots/weekl.description: Weekly metrics (FC-4, RO-1 to RO-5, IQ-4)

data/raw/{system}/query_logs/query_respo.description: 50,000 query/response pairs with NLI labels, scores, latency

data/raw/{S1,S3}/embeddings/context_embe.description: 50,000 × 512-dim context embeddings (RAG systems S1 and S3 only)

data/annotations/TI3_user_interpretabili.description: 1200 Likert ratings from users of S1, S3, S4. Cronbach α=0.84

data/perturbation_tests/{system}/typogra.description: 1250 typo perturbation test cases per system (5000 total). RO-1.

data/perturbation_tests/{system}/paraphr.description: 1000 paraphrase pairs per system (4000 total). RO-4.

data/perturbation_tests/{system}/ood_det.description: 750 OOD samples per system (3000 total). RO-3.

data/processed/aggregated/qalis_master_s.description: Master quality scores per system × dimension × month

data/processed/correlations/metric_corre.description: Pearson correlation matrix of 8 key metrics across n=3400 obs

data/processed/longitudinal/defect_detec.description: Monthly defect detection rates per approach
